domain_boundaries.allowed_scope: lexique, webapp/NiceGUI local private, prompt cockpit, prompt review, Sheets snapshots/read-only data migration, Apps Script functional recovery, operator handoff
domain_boundaries.forbidden_scope: broker execution, real orders, auto sizing, Revolut X execution backend, QAIT assets, public deploy without explicit release gate
domain_boundaries.source_of_truth: mvp-qaic-python repository + reviewed Sheets/App Script snapshots

domain_boundaries.allowed_scope: technical backend, market/scoring/risk engine, Revolut X crypto lane, execution-capable modules locked by human review and safety gates
domain_boundaries.forbidden_scope: MVP public/webapp product surface, QAIT Revolut Invest lane, unreviewed prompt apply

domain_boundaries.allowed_scope: actions, commodities, Revolut Invest lane, BigQuery/read-only inventories, provider-specific evidence packs
domain_boundaries.forbidden_scope: MVP prompt cockpit, MVP lexique/webapp, QAIC Revolut X crypto lane

migration_roadmap.objective: Create a deterministic local Python snapshot layer for key MVP Sheets tabs using read-only exports or already-approved local snapshots.
migration_roadmap.inputs: P165 source registry, live Sheets IDs, CONFIG/lexique/journal/prompt tables
migration_roadmap.outputs: tab registry, bounded CSV snapshots, schema/readiness report

migration_roadmap.objective: Convert the 22 Apps Script modules and 2738 function index into a ranked Python migration backlog by feature lane.
migration_roadmap.outputs: module backlog, feature parity matrix, port/no-port decisions

migration_roadmap.objective: Bind the reviewed reference prompt draft to local operator/NiceGUI prompt cockpit without automatic runtime replacement.
migration_roadmap.inputs: P166 reference draft, P167 review workbench, operator approval
migration_roadmap.outputs: prompt cockpit draft binding, preview smoke, manual apply gate

migration_roadmap.objective: Keep trading/backend execution outside MVP_QAIC_PY and document any later handoff contract to QAIC_PY.
migration_roadmap.inputs: MVP reviewed outputs only; no broker state copied into MVP

migration_roadmap.objective: Keep actions/commodities and Revolut Invest work completely outside MVP_QAIC_PY.
